name: Gruyere Apple Spread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Add the shredded Gruyere cheese and mix well.
3. Stir in the milk and prepared mustard until combined.
4. Fold in the shredded apple and chopped chives until evenly distributed.
This recipe remains accurate to the original while ensuring clear, numbered instructions and consistent formatting.
